Designing logic. Building intuition.

I am a Design Technologist specializing in modular UI systems and scalable architectures.
I bridge the gap between design vision and production through Advanced HTML/CSS, Figma Variables, and high-fidelity prototyping.

View my WorkLet’s build something

Selected work

Boardmatch

UI Development · HTML/CSS · B2B SaaS

End-to-end design and HTML/CSS implementation for a search-driven platform. Bridging the gap between visual concepts and production-ready code.

Avolta

Design Systems · WCAG · SharePoint

Redesign of the enterprise UX/UI architecture. Engineered a design system and custom HTML/CSS components to overcome technical constraints and ensure WCAG compliance.

Bladderboss

Figma · Design Systems · App Design

Built a comprehensive, scalable design system from scratch. Focused on component-driven design and systematic naming conventions to ensure a perfect handoff.

How I Work

01

Logic & Discovery

Mapping business goals into scalable architectures and lean user flows.

02

Systemic Design

Building with Figma Tokens. I design systems, not just screens.

03

UI Engineering

Translating visuals into clean HTML/CSS. Production-ready specs.

04

Visual QA & WCAG

Ensuring accessibility and design fidelity through technical testing.

Open to new challenges

Design with an
engineering mindset.

With 5+ years of experience, I specialize in transforming complex requirements into intuitive digital products. I don't just design interfaces; I architect systems that align human needs with technical feasibility.

My background in Frontend development allows me to bridge the gap between design and engineering. By speaking both languages, I ensure every decision is scalable, production-ready, and accessible from the first wireframe.

I thrive in B2B and SaaS ecosystems where complexity is the standard. My focus is on reducing friction, optimizing workflows, and delivering high-performance UI systems that developers can implement with ease.
